title: [BUS] Evaluate Cyclone DDS Python bindings with hello-world example
body:
## Objective
Confirm that cyclonedds-python is correctly installed and can publish and subscribe to a DDS topic.

## Acceptance Criteria
- cyclonedds added as a dependency in `pyproject.toml`
- A validation script `examples/validate_dds.py` publishes and receives a message on a local DDS topic
- Output confirms message was sent and received

## Implements
SVF-DEV-010

title: [BUS] Design DDS topic schema for telemetry and commands
body:
## Objective
Define the DDS topic structure for SVF telemetry (FMU outputs) and commands (FMU inputs).

## Acceptance Criteria
- Topic schema defined in `src/svf/topics.py` using cyclonedds IDL
- Telemetry topic carries: timestamp, variable name, value
- Command topic carries: timestamp, variable name, value
- Schema is documented with docstrings

## Implements
SVF-DEV-011, SVF-DEV-012

title: [BUS] Implement DDS publisher bridge from FMU outputs
body:
## Objective
Publish FMU output variables as typed DDS topics after each simulation step.

## Acceptance Criteria
- `DdsPublisher` class in `src/svf/bus.py`
- Publishes all FMU outputs to their respective DDS topics after each step
- Wired into SimulationMaster as an optional component alongside CsvLogger
- Integration test confirms messages are published during a simulation run

## Implements
SVF-DEV-010, SVF-DEV-011

title: [BUS] Implement DDS subscriber for command injection into FMU inputs
body:
## Objective
Subscribe to DDS command topics and inject received values into FMU input variables.

## Acceptance Criteria
- `DdsSubscriber` class in `src/svf/bus.py`
- Subscribes to command topics and applies values to FMU inputs before each step
- Wired into SimulationMaster as an optional component
- Integration test confirms commands received via DDS affect simulation outputs

## Implements
SVF-DEV-012
